title: Write ferrum_extlib_a11y.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_a11y: accessibility tree adapters for AT-SPI2 (Linux), NSAccessibility (macOS), UIA (Windows). Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: accessibility descriptor type per widget (role, label, description, value, state, actions), AT-SPI2 tree generation from widget tree, screen reader support (Orca), platform adapter trait, Wayland+X11 compatible via D-Bus.
